jsonld.name: Corrective Trajectory Bending
jsonld.description: Active generation of compensatory tokens designed to steer the actual conversation toward a counterfactual trajectory recognized as superior, experienced as using current output to retroactively bend the conversational path toward where a different earlier choice would have led.
